evals.name: single-article-ingest
evals.expected_output: Create a summary page for the article, entity pages for key entities (Claude Code, Anthropic, Prompt Caching), update wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md, and move the raw file to archive/

assertions.name: entities_created
assertions.description: At least 2 entity pages created in wiki/entities/

assertions.name: concepts_created
assertions.description: At least 2 concept pages created in wiki/concepts/

evals.name: batch-ingest
evals.prompt: 批量 ingest AI/raw/articles 下的所有文章
evals.expected_output: Process all articles in AI/raw/articles/, create/update wiki pages for each, update index.md and log.md once at the end, and archive all processed files

assertions.name: all_articles_processed
assertions.description: All raw articles have been archived

assertions.name: single_index_update
assertions.description: Index.md updated with all new pages

evals.name: auto-mode-ingest
evals.expected_output: Skip discussion step, directly create wiki pages (summary, entities like Karpathy/LLM Wiki, concepts like RAG vs Prompt Caching), update index.md/log.md, and archive the file

assertions.name: no_discussion_prompt
assertions.description: No discussion prompt was shown to user
